resumeText:
John Smith | john.smith@gmail.com | 555-1234

OBJECTIVE
To obtain a position in software development where I can use my skills and grow as a professional in a reputable company that offers good opportunities for learning and advancement.

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — State University (May 2024)
GPA: 3.1

SKILLS
Java, Python, HTML, CSS, Git, Microsoft Office, some JavaScript

COURSEWORK
Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Computer Networks, Discrete Mathematics, Web Development

ACTIVITIES
Computer Science Club (member, 2022–2024)
Intramural Basketball Team (2021–2024)
Volunteer tutor for introductory programming course (one semester, Spring 2023)

ACHIEVEMENTS
Completed senior capstone project: a simple inventory management app built with Java Swing and a local SQLite database. The project was completed as part of a 3-person group over one semester. Received a passing grade.

HONORS
Dean's List: Fall 2022 semester

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
Available for full-time positions starting June 2024. Willing to relocate. Open to internship extensions.

REFERENCES
Available upon request

Linda Marsh | Career Changer | lindamarsh@hotmail.com

OBJECTIVE
Looking to transition into the tech industry after 10 years in retail management. I am a hard worker and a fast learner. I enjoy working with computers and technology and believe my management background will transfer to a technical environment.

EXPERIENCE
Store Manager — BigBox Retail (2013–2023)
- Managed store operations and staff scheduling for 25 employees
- Handled customer complaints and resolved issues in a professional manner
- Responsible for opening and closing procedures and daily cash reconciliation
- Trained new employees on company policies and point-of-sale systems
- Maintained inventory records using store software

Sales Associate — Clothing Store (2010–2013)
- Helped customers find products and provided recommendations
- Operated cash register and processed returns
- Assisted with floor merchandising and stock organization

EDUCATION
High School Diploma — Lincoln High School (2009)
Online Course: Introduction to Computers (Coursera, 2023, 4 weeks)

SKILLS
Microsoft Word, Excel (basic), customer service, team leadership, time management, cash handling, inventory management

Michael Brown | Software Developer | m.brown@email.com

SUMMARY
Software developer with some experience looking for a job in tech. I like coding and computers and am willing to work hard. I am a team player who learns quickly and can adapt to new environments.

EXPERIENCE
Developer — Various Projects (2021–2023)
- Worked on projects for various clients
- Used different programming languages depending on the project
- Collaborated with team members to complete assignments
- Delivered work on time and communicated regularly with stakeholders
- Helped clients understand their technical requirements

Part-time Help Desk — Local Business (2019–2021)
- Helped employees with computer problems and answered questions
- Reset passwords and installed software on company machines
- Answered basic IT support questions via phone and email
- Maintained a log of support tickets and their resolutions

EDUCATION
Associate Degree — Community College (2021)
Courses included: Introduction to Programming, Computer Basics, Networking Fundamentals, Office Software

SKILLS
Computers, internet, some coding, Microsoft Office, customer service, phone support

REFERENCES
Available upon request

Jane Doe
Email: janedoe@gmail.com | Phone: 555-0100

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
I am a dedicated and hardworking professional with excellent communication skills. I am a team player who works well under pressure. I am passionate about technology and eager to contribute to a dynamic organization that values hard work and creativity. I have experience in various areas including administration and customer service and am always willing to learn new things and take on new challenges. I believe I would be a great addition to your company and am excited about the opportunity to grow.

WORK HISTORY
Administrative Assistant — Law Firm (2019–2023)
- Answered phones and scheduled appointments for 5 attorneys
- Filed documents and maintained records both digitally and in paper format
- Greeted clients and directed them to appropriate staff members
- Coordinated meeting rooms and prepared conference materials

Customer Service Representative — Call Center (2017–2019)
- Answered customer inquiries by phone and email
- Processed returns and exchanges and escalated complaints as needed

EDUCATION
B.A. Business Administration — Online University (2017)

SKILLS
Microsoft Office Suite, communication, organization, multitasking, scheduling, data entry

Robert Garcia | robert.garcia@yahoo.com | 555-0199

OBJECTIVE
Looking to get into a computer job because I like computers and have been watching a lot of YouTube videos about coding and web development. I think I would be good at it if someone gave me a chance to prove myself. I am a hard worker and have never been late to work in over 11 years of employment.

EXPERIENCE
Truck Driver — TransLogistics (2015–2023)
- Delivered freight across 12 states, maintaining a perfect safety record for 8 years
- Maintained vehicle logs and performed pre-trip safety inspections
- Achieved on-time delivery rate of 97% over tenure
- Trained 3 new drivers on company procedures and route planning

Warehouse Associate — Warehouse Co. (2012–2015)
- Loaded and unloaded delivery trucks under time pressure
- Operated forklift (certified, renewed 2014)
- Pulled orders from inventory using RF scanner system
- Assisted with quarterly inventory counts and reconciliation

EDUCATION
GED — Lincoln Adult Education Center (2011)
CDL License Class A (valid through 2025)
YouTube self-study: Python basics, HTML/CSS introductory tutorials (2023, ongoing)

SKILLS
Driving, logistics, forklift, physical labor, reliability, Microsoft Word (basic), internet

REFERENCES
Available upon request

Amy Chen | Software Developer | amychen@email.com

SUMMARY
Recent computer science graduate seeking software development opportunities. I completed an internship during my junior year and have been working on personal projects since graduation. I am a quick learner, a good communicator, and enjoy working in team environments as well as independently.

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — State University (2022)
Relevant coursework: Programming Fundamentals I & II, Data Structures, Web Development, Object-Oriented Design
GPA: 3.0

EXPERIENCE
Software Intern — Tech Company (Summer 2021)
- Helped with tasks assigned by senior developers on the platform team
- Attended daily standups and weekly team retrospective meetings
- Learned the company's internal tools and version control workflow
- Assisted the QA team with manual regression testing before a product release

PART-TIME WORK
Barista — Coffee Shop (2019–2022, part-time during school)
- Provided customer service and handled cash transactions
- Trained two new employees on drink preparation and POS system

SKILLS
Java, some Python, HTML, CSS, Microsoft Office, teamwork, communication

PROJECTS
Class project: Built a simple calculator in Java (group of 2, one semester assignment)

Harold Butts | Systems Programmer | hbutts@aol.com

SUMMARY
Experienced COBOL programmer with 25 years maintaining mainframe batch systems in the federal government sector. Seeking to transition into modern software development roles. Extensive knowledge of legacy IBM mainframe technology.

EXPERIENCE
Systems Programmer — Federal Insurance Agency (1998–2023)
- Maintained and enhanced COBOL batch jobs running on IBM z/OS mainframe platform
- Updated and debugged JCL scripts for weekly and monthly payroll processing programs
- Performed VSAM file maintenance, DB2 table modifications, and report generation
- Supported the agency's Y2K remediation effort across 200+ legacy programs in 1999
- Generated CICS transaction reports using RPG for business stakeholders
- Provided on-call production support for batch job failures on rotating schedule

Junior Programmer — State Government Department of Revenue (1995–1998)
- Wrote COBOL subroutines for the state legacy benefits administration system
- Maintained Fortran 77 scientific data processing programs
- Documented existing programs with inline comments for knowledge transfer

EDUCATION
A.S. Data Processing — Vocational College (1995)

SKILLS
COBOL, JCL, VSAM, DB2 (mainframe), CICS, RPG, Fortran 77, IBM z/OS
No cloud, containerization, web, or modern language experience

Kevin Wiliams | Sofware Developer | kevin.wiliams@gmial.com

SUMMARY
I am very good at programing and have been doing it for several years now. I am a passionate develoer who loves to code and build things for clients. I am looking for a new oppertunity to grow my career in a compay that values hard work and innovation and will give me room to excell.

EXPERIENCE
Developer — Freelance (2020 - present)
- Did lots of websites and apps for clients using variuos technolgies depending on the project
- Worked with data bases and front ends to build full stack solutions
- Communicated with clients and delievered projects on schedule most of the time
- Maintained exisitng websites for several local buisnesses

IT Support — Random Company (2018 - 2020)
- Fixed comptuers and helped users with there problems on a daily basis
- Installed sofware and preformed updates on company machines
- Answerd the help desk phone and logged tickets into the system
- Helped onboard new employes with their comptuers and accounts

EDUCATION
Some college coursework, no degree completed

SKILLS
HTML CSS Javascript Python maybe some others, computers in general, problem solving
